name: data-table
description: A sortable, paginated data table with WAI-ARIA grid semantics; column-header aria-sort, client-side sort + pagination, emits lv-sort and lv-page events.
docs: Register <lv-data-table> by importing components/ui/data-table.ts from your entry point. Pass `columns` (array of { key, label, sortable?, align? }) and `rows` (array of plain objects). Listen for `lv-sort` ({ key, direction }) and `lv-page` ({ page }) to integrate server-side sorting/pagination.
